Gets a specific event

<Heading id={'request'} as={'h2'} className={'openapi-tabs__heading'} children={'Request'}></Heading>

<ParamsDetails
  parameters={[{ name: 'id', in: 'path', description: 'The ID of an event', schema: { type: 'string' }, required: true }]}
></ParamsDetails>

<RequestSchema title={'Body'} body={undefined}></RequestSchema>

  id={undefined}
  label={undefined}
  responses={{
    '200': {
      description: '200',
      content: {
        'application/json': {
          examples: {
            Result: {
              value:
                '{\n  "eventId": "<id-of-event>",\n  "objectId": "<id-of-alias>",\n  "timestamp": "<timestamp>",\n  "type": "<type-of-event>",\n  "data": {},\n  "organizationId": "<id-of-organization>"\n}',
            },
          },
          schema: {
            type: 'object',
            properties: {
              eventId: { type: 'string', example: '<id-of-event>' },
              objectId: { type: 'string', example: '<id-of-alias>' },
              timestamp: { type: 'string', example: '<timestamp>' },
              type: { type: 'string', example: '<type-of-event>' },
              data: { type: 'object', properties: {} },
              organizationId: { type: 'string', example: '<id-of-organization>' },
            },
          },
        },

    '400': {

      content: { 'application/json': { examples: { Result: { value: '{}' } }, schema: { type: 'object', properties: {} } } },
